messages.subject: [RsR] Where are the 2022 archives for this list (R-SIG-Robust)
messages.subject_clean: [RsR] Where are the 2022 archives for this list (R-SIG-Robust)
messages.body_plain:
The archives here seem to stop in March 2021.
https://stat.ethz.ch/pipermail/r-sig-robust/
messages.body_snippet:
The archives here seem to stop in March 2021.
https://stat.ethz.ch/pipermail/r-sig-robust/

messages.subject: [RsR] Where are the 2022 archives for this list (R-SIG-Robust)
messages.subject_clean: [RsR] Where are the 2022 archives for this list (R-SIG-Robust)
messages.body_plain:
>>>>> Kelly Thompson 
>>>>>     on Sun, 24 Apr 2022 12:32:08 -0400 writes:

    > The archives here seem to stop in March 2021.
    > https://stat.ethz.ch/pipermail/r-sig-robust/

Well, they no longer do -- guess why?  ;-)

Yes, this is a low volume mailing list .. and it seems poeple do
not use e-mail as much as 10 years ago.

But in my experience you still get good answers on questions
about using robust methods (estimation, inference, ...) with R.

Best regards,
Martin

--
Martin Maechler
ETH Zurich   and  R Core team
